---
title: "News"
format:
  html:
    body-classes: news-page
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [image, title, description, date, author, author_image]
  categories: false
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const posts = document.querySelectorAll("#listing-listing .quarto-post");
  posts.forEach((post) => {
    const author = post.querySelector(".listing-author");
    const authorImageMeta = post.querySelector(".listing-author_image");
    if (!author || !authorImageMeta) return;

    const imagePath = authorImageMeta.textContent.trim();
    if (!imagePath) return;

    const wrap = document.createElement("div");
    wrap.className = "listing-author-wrap";

    const img = document.createElement("img");
    img.className = "listing-author-avatar";
    img.src = imagePath;
    img.alt = "Photo of " + author.textContent.trim();

    author.parentNode.insertBefore(wrap, author);
    wrap.appendChild(img);
    wrap.appendChild(author);
    authorImageMeta.remove();
  });
});
</script>
```
